summary: Phase 2 Core Product UX testing complete. All key features verified: TrustLogo component with proper sizing across pages, Transaction Detail page with 6-step progress tracker, status card with next action guidance, trust layer box with 3 protection points, and two-column layout with sticky sidebar showing deal summary, parties, and share code.

issues: Minor React warning: validateDOMNesting - <tr> cannot appear as child of <span> in table component

critical_code_review_comments.comment: Logo component properly implemented with size variants (small=h-10, default=h-12, large=h-14, xlarge=h-20)
6-step progress tracker with proper state mapping, emerald progress line, responsive design (desktop horizontal, mobile compact)
Status card with dynamic colors, next action guidance, and escrow notice based on transaction state
Two-column layout with sticky sidebar, trust layer box, step tracker, and comprehensive transaction management
Using TrustLogo component in navbar and footer with proper sizing
Using TrustLogo component with large size, Google-first auth flow
Using TrustLogo component with small size in navbar

seed_data_creation: Created transaction txn_7c0f7f9a5929 via API for testing Transaction Detail page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 UX complete. Key features: (1) TrustLogo PNG component with size variants used across all pages, (2) Transaction Detail has 6-step progress tracker (Created→Confirmed→Paid→Secured→Delivered→Released), (3) Trust Layer Box with 3 protection bullet points, (4) Two-column layout with sticky sidebar showing Deal Summary, Share Code, and Parties, (5) Status card shows current state with 'What happens next' guidance. Logo file at /app/frontend/public/trusttrade-logo-new.png
